title: Real Estate Listing
description: Schema for extracting data from real estate listings.

address.description: The full physical address of the property

price.description: The listing price of the property in local currency

bathrooms.description: Number of bathrooms (can be fractional, e.g. 1.5)

square_feet.description: The total area of the property in square feet

property_type.description: Type of property (e.g., Single Family, Condo, Townhouse, Apartment)

listing_url.description: The direct URL to the property listing

agency.description: Name of the real estate agency

contact_phone.description: Contact phone number of the agent or agency

description.description: Detailed text description of the property
